1.title: Guinea: President Doumbouya signs the end of raw gold exports
1.content: Guinean President, General Mamadi Doumbouya, is opening a new era in gold mining. During a meeting at his palace in Conakry with the main companies exploiting this mineral in the country, he announced the end of all exports of raw gold extracted from the subsoil.

2.title: Italian Leonardo and Turkish Baykar jointly test unmanned aerial vehicles
2.content: The Italian defense company Leonardo and the Turkish aerospace company Baykar have successfully concluded the first joint test flights of their new unmanned aerial systems, marking a significant milestone in bilateral defense cooperation.

7.title: Shakira refusing to kiss her son: the scene in the stands of Argentina - Austria amuses social media
7.content: Present in the stands for the Argentina - Austria match, Colombian superstar Shakira was cheered when she appeared on the giant screen while playfully avoiding a kiss from her son, creating a lighthearted moment that quickly went viral.

6.title: 2026 World Cup: Zlatan Ibrahimovic predicts an unexpected winner
6.content: The World Cup is in full swing, with most of the favorites already making their mark during the first matchday. This is notably the case for the France and Germany teams, who both put on impressive performances, though not enough to convince Zlatan Ibrahimovic, who envisions USA a completely different, unexpected winner lifting the trophy in this 2026 tournament.

5.title: MIGRANT RETURN REGULATION: THE UN CRITICIZES THE NEW EUROPEAN LAW
5.content: The UN is raising its voice against the European Union, estimating that decisions regarding expulsion from European soil to third countries must be individual and not massive. Such collective measures would constitute a manifest violation of human rights and refugee protections. Last Wednesday, the European Parliament approved a reform that provides a framework for expedited return procedures.

4.title: Michael Olise Transfer: PSG or Real Madrid? Deschamps advises him to join another team!
4.content: Two years after his transfer from Crystal Palace to Bayern Munich, Michael Olise (24 years old) is once again making headlines in the transfer market. As it turns out, Paris Saint-Germain and Real Madrid are both tracking him closely. Should we expect him to seek a change of scenery this off-season once his World Cup campaign with the French national team comes to an end?

3.title: World Cup. Scenes of violence between Argentine and Algerian fans in New York
3.content: As the reigning world champions, Argentina entered the 2026 World Cup against Algeria on Tuesday night (3 a.m.). A few hours before the kickoff, supporters from both nations gathered in Times Square, New York, where tensions escalated and physical altercations broke out between the rival crowds.
